chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1357 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 06-03-2024 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Samejo, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for SIDA along with Muhammad Ali Zardari, Director, AWB, Ghotki. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional A.G a/w Anwar Ali, SSP, Ghotki and Atta Muhammad, PDSP, Ghotki. ***** The Director, AWB, Ghotki is present and submits that water to the petitioner’s land for two days has been provided. The petitioner, however, claims that his share is for three days as per share-list, which starts from Tuesday at 11-15 a.m till Friday 10-45 p.m. The Director undertakes that water to the petitioner’s land, as per share list, would be provided. If the respondents No.9&10 mounts any hindrance in the way of providing water to the land of the petitioner, the SSP, Ghotki, who is present today, is directed to take action on petitioner’s approach in this respect in accordance with law against the respondents No.9&10. Petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
